what_was_done: Fixed skills-v2 MCP server hang: restructured EmbeddingIndex to non-blocking (add stores text, search computes lazily), BM25 indexes at startup, embedding model loads in background thread. Tested 6/10 tools live (list_skills, skill_health, record_outcome, skill_usage, skill_lineage, search_skills).
